description: Model a 30m x 20m flat-roofed warehouse (8m high) in SketchUp. On the roof, create a 2x3 grid of skylights (6 total), each measuring 2m x 1m. Extrude the skylights slightly so they are raised. Then, use the Skelion plugin to install solar panels on the roof (10 degree tilt, South-facing/180 azimuth) such that they fill the available roof space but strictly AVOID covering the skylights. Save your completed model to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\warehouse_skylights.skp'.
